StepAction: New turn dispatched; request body composed (Ch06) with all cache-affecting dimensions
Emit 7+ wire-level cache-affecting dimensions: prompt_cache_key, client_metadata keys, body content (input[]+tools+instructions), identity headers, model, service_tier, reasoning

WS path: get_incremental_items(request, last_response, allow_empty_delta) — gate sequence: prior last_request present? non-input fields match? response_id non-empty? input strict-prefix-extends baseline?
Emit ResponseCreate { previous_response_id: Some(last_response.response_id), input: incremental_items, ..payload }
Emit ResponseCreate { previous_response_id: None, input: full } (full-mode); backend may still match via prompt_cache_key but explicit chain is broken
Read TokenUsage.cached_input_tokens from ResponseEvent::Completed; log + telemetry
Stash WebsocketSession.last_request = current request; LastResponse.items_added accumulated; ready for next turn
Compaction fires (Ch09 endpoint OR resume with Compacted items); advance_window_generation; next turn's x-codex-window-id changes → cache namespace shifts on WS dimension
Condition: window shifted; cache lineage on new namespace
